blocks.input:
{"content": "In the quiet hours of dawn,
When shadow and light merge, soft and slow,
I find myself walking, unseen, alone,
With the echoes of yesterday, to say.

The world wakes up to begin its race,
But time stands still in my path.
I hold the weight of every choice,
In the silence of the sun's first gasp.

No words remain to speak to you,
But love lingers in empty air.
A thousand stories, unspoken, unmade,
Are woven in what's no longer there.

Yet I keep moving, onward, through,
The forest of memories, so deep.
For every end births something new,
And hope, in its turn, does not sleep.
", "path": "poem.txt"}
blocks.name: write_file
